text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Trainer! You better believe I enjoyed the
break!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I had a real whopper of a hamburger at the mall!
It was lip-smackin' good!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That burger was just what I needed to give
today's training my all!
